title: Jewish Calendar - Hebrew Calendar
excerpt: Is there option to add date column with hebrew calendar? hebrew date? like י"ב חשון תשפ"ג?

posts.author: imsh (imsh)
posts.cookedHtml: Is there option to add date column with hebrew calendar? hebrew date? like י"ב חשון תשפ"ג?

posts.author: DanaWD (Dana Wizman Danan)
posts.cookedHtml: I’m interested in knowing too! Thank you

posts.author: samuel222 (Sam A)
posts.cookedHtml: https://www.hebcal.com/ has various integration’s

posts.author: reinier (Reinier ― 📅 Calendar Plus 🍅 Automato)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @imsh, @DanaWD, @samuel222,

We recently received a similar feature request for our calendar app. Our app shows Israeli holidays, of which many overlap with major Jewish holidays as far as I now.

I’m not very familiar with Jewish culture and would like to understand how we could help our Jewish users and potentially others here to navigate their calendar and holidays better. It’s easy enough to add such information, but I think there are different needs

Hebcal is a great source of such information, but I’d love to understand what different people need. Different countries, different varieties of Judaism, major/minor holidays? Do people want every Jewish calendar day in their calendar, or just the Rosh Chodesh? In addition to the Gregorian calendar?

Thanks, Reinier

–
Try automagical’s free Calendar Plus calendar replacement

posts.author: DanaWD (Dana Wizman Danan)
posts.cookedHtml:
Dear Reinier,

Thank you for reaching out. It’s so nice to try and do some research based on your customer’s requests.

I am happy to jump on a quick call to elaborate on the aspects of the Jewish Calendar.

I am based in London so my time is BST.

Good luck with your research!

Dana
